_note: Curated Open5e reskins for dark fantasy. Grim renames over real stat blocks; cr denormalized and verified by scripts/test-bestiary.mjs.

entries.name: Plague Rat
entries.blurb: bloated vermin of the charnel streets

entries.name: Deserter
entries.blurb: broken soldier turned road-wolf

entries.name: Penitent of the Pit
entries.blurb: scarred flagellant sworn to old powers

entries.name: Gravekin
entries.blurb: stunted scavenger of tomb warrens

entries.name: Corpse-Tick
entries.blurb: fist-sized bloodsucker from the fens

entries.name: Plague Thrall
entries.blurb: pox-riddled corpse that will not stay down

entries.name: Gallows Bones
entries.blurb: hanged men marching again

entries.name: Mire Goblin
entries.blurb: cruel bog-dweller with a rusted knife

entries.name: Carrion Wolf
entries.blurb: gaunt pack-hunter grown bold on the dead

entries.name: Hollow Friar
entries.blurb: priest whose prayers go somewhere wrong

entries.name: Gloamspawn
entries.blurb: living dark that drinks the strength from men

entries.name: Debt Collector
entries.blurb: knuckle-scarred enforcer of the low guilds

entries.name: Ashland Reaver
entries.blurb: burned-land raider who takes trophies

entries.name: Famine Jackal
entries.blurb: laughing man-eater that follows armies

entries.name: Iron Legionnaire
entries.blurb: grim conscript of the endless war

entries.name: Night Hound
entries.blurb: black hound that speaks men's names

entries.name: Graveyard Feeder
entries.blurb: paralytic claws, appetite for the fresh dead

entries.name: Widow's Grief
entries.blurb: wailing shade of the unquiet dead

entries.name: Blackfang
entries.blurb: wolf grown monstrous on cursed ground

entries.name: Gallows Siren
entries.blurb: sings the despairing off the cliff road

entries.name: Whispering Familiar
entries.blurb: small devil that trades in secrets

entries.name: Widow of the Eaves
entries.blurb: cathedral-rafter weaver of shrouds

entries.name: Cellar Lurker
entries.blurb: hulking strangler under the floorboards

entries.name: Charnel Prince
entries.blurb: reeking lord of the feeding pits

entries.name: Blood Vicar
entries.blurb: preacher whose sermons cut both ways

entries.name: Flagellant Champion
entries.blurb: pain-drunk zealot swinging iron

entries.name: Cathedral Watcher
entries.blurb: stone saint that unfolds its wings

entries.name: Gutter Prophet
entries.blurb: plague-blessed shapechanger of the slums

entries.name: Corpse Candle
entries.blurb: grave-light that leads to drowning pools

entries.name: Tollbridge Brute
entries.blurb: flesh-hungry keeper of the broken bridge

entries.name: Reliquary Maw
entries.blurb: false shrine that eats the faithful

entries.name: Unshriven Soul
entries.blurb: spirit denied burial, hungry for warmth

entries.name: Barrow Knight
entries.blurb: dead lord still commanding dead men

entries.name: Fen Crone
entries.blurb: bargain-maker in the drowned wood

entries.name: Pyre Hound
entries.blurb: burning dog loosed from execution grounds

entries.name: Salt-Wrapped King
entries.blurb: preserved tyrant with a withering curse

entries.name: Moon-Cursed
entries.blurb: neighbor by day, butcher by night

entries.name: Frostmaw
entries.blurb: white wolf that breathes the long winter

entries.name: Oubliette Bull
entries.blurb: horned executioner of the under-prison

entries.name: Witch-Hunter Captain
entries.blurb: burns first, questions after

entries.name: Hollow Knight
entries.blurb: armor animated by a broken oath

entries.name: Veil Spinner
entries.blurb: steps between worlds to bite

entries.name: Butcher Twins
entries.blurb: two-headed horror of the slaughter-yards

entries.name: Ruin Temptress
entries.blurb: beautiful lie coiled in a dead palace

entries.name: Grave Seepage
entries.blurb: acid ooze from beneath the ossuary

entries.name: Gallows Troll
entries.blurb: regrows everything but its hatred

entries.name: Pale Courtier
entries.blurb: elegant predator of candlelit halls

entries.name: Reaper of the Fields
entries.blurb: scythe-shadow that harvests souls

entries.name: Stitched Penitent
entries.blurb: sewn from executed men, hates its makers

entries.name: Plague Garden
entries.blurb: walking rot that swallows the living

entries.name: Dream Peddler
entries.blurb: sells sleep, collects souls

entries.name: Veiled Countess
entries.blurb: her statues line the family crypt

entries.name: Heretic's Beast
entries.blurb: three-headed blasphemy of flesh

entries.name: Blood Alchemist
entries.blurb: scholar who pays in other people's veins

entries.name: Nightgaunt Lord
entries.blurb: child-stealing giant of the dark hours

entries.name: Guild Mourner
entries.blurb: attends the funeral before the death

entries.name: Sorrow of the Deep Fen
entries.blurb: many-necked thing the village feeds

entries.name: Winter King's Housecarl
entries.blurb: giant sworn to the endless frost

entries.name: Debt-Taker
entries.blurb: infernal bailiff with a hooked pole

entries.name: Furnace Lord
entries.blurb: master of the slave-forges

entries.name: Idol of the Old Faith
entries.blurb: god-statue that answers blood offerings

entries.name: The Drowned Memory
entries.blurb: elder thing beneath the black lake

entries.name: Crypt Serpent
entries.blurb: coiled warden of the forbidden vault

entries.name: Storm-Wyrm of the Pass
entries.blurb: lightning-gulleted mountain terror

entries.name: The Undying Regent
entries.blurb: rules from behind a dozen masks

entries.name: Lord of the High Castle
entries.blurb: the valley's true and ancient owner

entries.name: The Salt Prophet
entries.blurb: dead god-king whose word still binds

entries.name: The Hollow Saint
entries.blurb: worshipped still, rotting on a hidden throne
